sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62237" key="leimwnoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειμων-οειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n62237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like meadows, grassy and flowery</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1247.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ceb.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
